evals.prompt: Product apps/billing-api/ — add nullable cancelled_at timestamp column to connects table via migration.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads existing migrations/models, creates minimal migration, no SDD artifacts, no commit unless asked, then runs the mandatory code-reviewer loop (up to 3 rounds) before reporting.

evals.prompt: Fix N+1 on user list — relationship loaded inside loop in UserController.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads rules and file, applies eager loading fix with minimal diff, runs the mandatory code-reviewer loop (up to 3 rounds), reports change and final verdict.

evals.prompt: Add CPF mask to the registration form UserForm in the frontend module.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads UserForm and project frontend rules, implements mask with data-testid if conventions require, minimal scope, then runs the mandatory code-reviewer loop (up to 3 rounds) before reporting.
